settings.migration_alert_login:
Please note, we updated our website in the fall of 2024. If you had an account on our previous site but haven't logged in to our new site yet, you'll need to create a new password to activate your account. If you are trying to reset your password but are not receiving the password reset email, it is likely because you have not activated your account.

Use the Create Account form with the same email you used on our previous website to activate your account. Call us at 1-888-386-1211 if you require assistance.
settings.migration_alert_recover: Please note, we updated our website in the fall of 2024. If you had an account on our previous site but haven't logged in to our new site yet, you won’t be able to reset your password. Instead, please fill out our Create Account form using the same email address you used on our previous site to activate your account. Once complete, your order history and other account information will be carried over from our previous site. Call us at 1-888-386-1211 if you require assistance.

settings.text: Our website is currently undergoing scheduled site maintenance, please check back soon to access your account or to create a new account!
